response.justification: The candidate brings strong general software engineering breadth spanning 17+ years, demonstrated scale at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/second), and recent AI-agent infrastructure work — all positive signals. However, the role's core requirements center on experimentation platforms, feature-flagging, telemetry infrastructure, and statistical/experimental analysis, none of which appear anywhere in the resume. Growth engineering is entirely absent from the work history. The candidate's seniority level (Staff SE since April 2025) is below the IC6/Principal target, and while languages align, the specialized platform-building experience this role demands is not evidenced.
strengths: Genuine high-scale systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O architecture
Polyglot engineer with production experience in JavaScript/TypeScript, C/C++, C#, Java, and more — matches the language requirements
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, aligning with the company's AI-first engineering direction
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout frameworks, or bias/guardrail work mentioned anywhere
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis background across 17+ years of employment history
No growth engineering exposure; work history is dominated by product features, GIS platforms, and direct-mail automation — domains far removed from growth and measurement systems

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
